resources.string: Read SMS data via GwaBoard IPC
Allows the GwaBoard keyboard to read SMS profiles via secure inter-process communication. Only apps signed with the same certificate can obtain this permission.
This utility app provides SMS context to the GwaBoard keyboard for smarter suggestions. All data stays on your device — no internet access required.
GwaBoard Companion needs the following permissions to build context profiles from your messages:
Send SMS — default SMS handler capability
For the best experience, set GwaBoard Companion as your default SMS handler. This allows real-time profile building from incoming messages.
Permanently remove all profiles and cached data. The keyboard app will also be notified to clear its caches. This action cannot be undone.
This will permanently remove all profiles, analysis data, and cached content. The keyboard app will also clear any cached profiles. This action cannot be undone.
Remove a specific contact\'s analysis profile. The keyboard will be notified to clear any cached data for this contact.
This will permanently remove the analysis profile for %1$s. This action cannot be undone.

GwaBoard Companion analyzes SMS conversation patterns to build statistical profiles per contact. It extracts:

• Dominant language detection
• Conversational tone (formal, casual, etc.)
• Average response length
• Frequently used word patterns (n-grams)

No raw message content is stored — only derived statistics. All processing happens entirely on your device. No data is ever sent to any server.
